canonical_definition: The original Moral Foundations Questionnaire, a psychometric instrument designed to measure how individuals evaluate abstract moral scenarios in relation to their own values.
papers: Do All Autoregressive Transformers Remember Facts the Same Way? A Cross-Architecture Analysis of Recall Mechanisms
No Need for Explanations:LLMs can implicitly learn from mistakes in-context
